narrative:
North Royalton-05-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,006 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
